items.title: Witkoff says 'meaningful progress' made as Ukraine talks enter second day
items.dek: The US special envoy struck an optimistic note after the first day of talks in Geneva, but hopes for a breakthrough remain low.
items.body: The US special envoy struck an optimistic note after the first day of talks in Geneva, but hopes for a breakthrough remain low.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Suspect in Rhode Island ice hockey shooting killed ex-wife and son
items.dek: Robert Dorgan - who also went by the name Roberta Esposito - was found dead inside the Pawtucket arena.
items.body: Robert Dorgan - who also went by the name Roberta Esposito - was found dead inside the Pawtucket arena.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Peru's president impeached four months into term
items.dek: José Jerí is the third consecutive president to be ousted and the country's seventh since 2016.
items.body: José Jerí is the third consecutive president to be ousted and the country's seventh since 2016.
items.author: IriLine Desk
